category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes tgpt as AI chatbots in terminal.
source_facts.description says it provides AI chatbots in the terminal without API keys.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title uses aandrew-me/tgpt.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo both point to the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/aandrew-me/tgpt, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies AI chatbots in terminal without API keys.
source_facts.executables lists tgpt as a command-line executable.
